text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Pardon me. My attention lapsed for a
moment there. Pay it no mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for making you worry and will
endeavor to be more diligent in the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's down to race exhaustion, but Mejiro
Ardan is struggling to focus on training. I may
need to rethink her schedule.
